summary.en: EMC emission performance of LED lighting equipment for Rwanda is assessed under the Rwanda Standard adopting CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), within the RSB PVoC programme. The requirement controls radio-frequency disturbance (conducted and radiated emissions) so the product does not interfere with radio reception and other equipment. A Certificate of Conformity per consignment and import inspection apply. For lighting with no intentional radio transmitter, this is the EMC emission element; radio-transmitter approval is handled separately by RURA (see RURA topic).
summary.zh: 面向卢旺达的 LED 照明设备 EMC 发射性能依据采用 CISPR 15（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性限值与测量方法）的卢旺达标准在 RSB PVoC 计划内评定。该要求控制射频骚扰（传导与辐射发射），使产品不干扰无线电接收及其他设备。须取得逐批符合性证书并进行进口检验。对于无有意发射器的照明设备，此为 EMC 发射要素；无线电发射器批准由 RURA 单独处理（见 RURA 主题）。
summary.zht: 面向盧旺達的 LED 照明設備 EMC 發射性能依據採用 CISPR 15（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性限值與測量方法）的盧旺達標準在 RSB PVoC 計劃內評定。該要求控制射頻騷擾（傳導與輻射發射），使產品不干擾無線電接收及其他設備。須取得逐批符合性證書並進行進口檢驗。對於無有意發射器的照明設備，此為 EMC 發射要素；無線電發射器批准由 RURA 單獨處理（見 RURA 主題）。

standards_or_laws: RS / CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (adopted Rwanda Standard)
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment

summary.en: China's equivalent emission standard is GB/T 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which transposes CISPR 15. EMC requirements form part of CCC assessment for in-scope lighting under the applicable CNCA rules. The Chinese GB/T 17743 report is domestic evidence; under the RSB PVoC route, a CISPR 15-based emission report (often from an ILAC-accredited lab) is normally what the inspection body relies on.
summary.zh: 中国对应的发射标准为 GB/T 17743（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性限值与测量方法），转化自 CISPR 15。EMC 要求是范围内照明产品 CCC 评定的组成部分（依适用 CNCA 规则）。中国 GB/T 17743 报告属境内证据；在 RSB PVoC 路径下，检验机构通常采用基于 CISPR 15 的发射报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室）。
summary.zht: 中國對應的發射標準為 GB/T 17743（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性限值與測量方法），轉化自 CISPR 15。EMC 要求是範圍內照明產品 CCC 評定的組成部分（依適用 CNCA 規則）。中國 GB/T 17743 報告屬境內證據；在 RSB PVoC 路徑下，檢驗機構通常採用基於 CISPR 15 的發射報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (transposes CISPR 15)

gap.en: GB/T 17743 and RS / CISPR 15 share the same CISPR 15 base, so emission limits are largely aligned. The gap is the route and report acceptance, not the technical limits: Rwanda requires the RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment and import inspection, and does not automatically accept the Chinese CCC EMC evidence. The PVoC body typically relies on a CISPR 15 emission report from an accredited laboratory and may inspect the consignment. Test the product at its Rwandan 230 V / 50 Hz operating condition.
gap.zh: GB/T 17743 与 RS／CISPR 15 同以 CISPR 15 为基础，故发射限值基本一致。差距在于路径与报告接受而非技术限值：卢旺达要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性证书并进行进口检验，且不自动接受中国 CCC 的 EMC 证据。PVoC 机构通常采用来自认可实验室的 CISPR 15 发射报告，并可能对货物进行检验。须在卢旺达 230 V／50 Hz 工作条件下测试产品。
gap.zht: GB/T 17743 與 RS／CISPR 15 同以 CISPR 15 為基礎，故發射限值基本一致。差距在於路徑與報告接受而非技術限值：盧旺達要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性證書並進行進口檢驗，且不自動接受中國 CCC 的 EMC 證據。PVoC 機構通常採用來自認可實驗室的 CISPR 15 發射報告，並可能對貨物進行檢驗。須在盧旺達 230 V／50 Hz 工作條件下測試產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emission compliance to RS / CISPR 15 required within the RSB PVoC programme; Certificate of Conformity per consignment
mandatory_status.cn: EMC compliance to GB/T 17743 forms part of CCC assessment where the lighting product is in CNCA scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lighting for Rwanda must meet EMC emission limits under RS / CISPR 15 within the RSB PVoC programme, with a Certificate of Conformity per consignment. GB/T 17743 and CISPR 15 are aligned, but Chinese CCC EMC evidence is not automatically accepted; a CISPR 15 report from an accredited lab is typically required. Radio-transmitter approval is handled separately by RURA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卢旺达的 LED 照明须在 RSB PVoC 计划内符合 RS／CISPR 15 发射限值，并取得逐批符合性证书。GB/T 17743 与 CISPR 15 一致，但中国 CCC 的 EMC 证据不会被自动接受；通常须提供来自认可实验室的 CISPR 15 报告。无线电发射器批准由 RURA 单独处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向盧旺達的 LED 照明須在 RSB PVoC 計劃內符合 RS／CISPR 15 發射限值，並取得逐批符合性證書。GB/T 17743 與 CISPR 15 一致，但中國 CCC 的 EMC 證據不會被自動接受；通常須提供來自認可實驗室的 CISPR 15 報告。無線電發射器批准由 RURA 單獨處理。

summary.en: EMC immunity of LED lighting for Rwanda is assessed under the Rwanda Standard adopting IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements), within the RSB PVoC programme. It defines immunity to electrostatic discharge, radiated and conducted RF fields, fast transients / bursts, surges, voltage dips and interruptions on the 230 V / 50 Hz supply. A Certificate of Conformity per consignment and import inspection apply. Together with the CISPR 15 emission element, this completes the EMC assessment for non-radio LED lighting.
summary.zh: 面向卢旺达的 LED 照明 EMC 抗扰度依据采用 IEC 61547（一般照明用设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）的卢旺达标准在 RSB PVoC 计划内评定。其规定对静电放电、辐射与传导射频场、快速瞬变／脉冲群、浪涌、230 V／50 Hz 供电的电压暂降与中断的抗扰度。须取得逐批符合性证书并进行进口检验。与 CISPR 15 发射要素一并，完成非无线 LED 照明的 EMC 评定。
summary.zht: 面向盧旺達的 LED 照明 EMC 抗擾度依據採用 IEC 61547（一般照明用設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）的盧旺達標準在 RSB PVoC 計劃內評定。其規定對靜電放電、輻射與傳導射頻場、快速瞬變／脈衝群、浪湧、230 V／50 Hz 供電的電壓暫降與中斷的抗擾度。須取得逐批符合性證書並進行進口檢驗。與 CISPR 15 發射要素一併，完成非無線 LED 照明的 EMC 評定。

standards_or_laws: RS / IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (adopted Rwanda Standard)
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment

summary.en: China's equivalent immunity standard is GB/T 18595 (General lighting equipment — EMC immunity requirements), which transposes IEC 61547. Immunity forms part of the EMC element of CCC assessment for in-scope lighting under the applicable CNCA rules. The Chinese GB/T 18595 report is domestic evidence; the RSB PVoC route normally relies on an IEC 61547-based immunity report, often from an ILAC-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国对应的抗扰度标准为 GB/T 18595（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求），转化自 IEC 61547。抗扰度是范围内照明产品 CCC 评定中 EMC 要素的组成部分（依适用 CNCA 规则）。中国 GB/T 18595 报告属境内证据；RSB PVoC 路径通常采用基于 IEC 61547 的抗扰度报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室）。
summary.zht: 中國對應的抗擾度標準為 GB/T 18595（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求），轉化自 IEC 61547。抗擾度是範圍內照明產品 CCC 評定中 EMC 要素的組成部分（依適用 CNCA 規則）。中國 GB/T 18595 報告屬境內證據；RSB PVoC 路徑通常採用基於 IEC 61547 的抗擾度報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595 — General lighting equipment — EMC immunity requirements (transposes IEC 61547)

gap.en: GB/T 18595 and RS / IEC 61547 share the IEC 61547 base, so immunity requirements are largely aligned. The gap is again the route and report acceptance: Rwanda requires the RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment and import inspection and does not automatically accept Chinese CCC EMC evidence; the PVoC body typically relies on an IEC 61547 immunity report from an accredited lab. Surge / dip immunity should be evaluated for the 230 V / 50 Hz network the product will operate on.
gap.zh: GB/T 18595 与 RS／IEC 61547 同以 IEC 61547 为基础，故抗扰度要求基本一致。差距同样在于路径与报告接受：卢旺达要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性证书并进行进口检验，且不自动接受中国 CCC 的 EMC 证据；PVoC 机构通常采用来自认可实验室的 IEC 61547 抗扰度报告。浪涌／暂降抗扰度应针对产品将运行的 230 V／50 Hz 电网评估。
gap.zht: GB/T 18595 與 RS／IEC 61547 同以 IEC 61547 為基礎，故抗擾度要求基本一致。差距同樣在於路徑與報告接受：盧旺達要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性證書並進行進口檢驗，且不自動接受中國 CCC 的 EMC 證據；PVoC 機構通常採用來自認可實驗室的 IEC 61547 抗擾度報告。浪湧／暫降抗擾度應針對產品將運行的 230 V／50 Hz 電網評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity to RS / IEC 61547 required within the RSB PVoC programme; Certificate of Conformity per consignment
mandatory_status.cn: EMC immunity to GB/T 18595 forms part of CCC assessment where the lighting product is in CNCA scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lighting for Rwanda must meet EMC immunity under RS / IEC 61547 within the RSB PVoC programme, with a Certificate of Conformity per consignment. GB/T 18595 and IEC 61547 are aligned, but Chinese CCC EMC evidence is not automatically accepted; an IEC 61547 immunity report from an accredited lab is typically required, evaluated for the 230 V / 50 Hz supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卢旺达的 LED 照明须在 RSB PVoC 计划内符合 RS／IEC 61547 抗扰度，并取得逐批符合性证书。GB/T 18595 与 IEC 61547 一致，但中国 CCC 的 EMC 证据不会被自动接受；通常须提供来自认可实验室的 IEC 61547 抗扰度报告，并针对 230 V／50 Hz 供电评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向盧旺達的 LED 照明須在 RSB PVoC 計劃內符合 RS／IEC 61547 抗擾度，並取得逐批符合性證書。GB/T 18595 與 IEC 61547 一致，但中國 CCC 的 EMC 證據不會被自動接受；通常須提供來自認可實驗室的 IEC 61547 抗擾度報告，並針對 230 V／50 Hz 供電評估。
